channel.title: NDTV News Search Records Found 1000
channel.description: NDTV.com provides the latest information from and in-depth coverage of India and the world. Find breaking news, India news, top stories, elections, politics, business, cricket, movies, lifestyle, health, live TV, videos, photos and more.

item.title: 90 Killed, 9 Still Missing After Explosion At Coal Mine In China

media:content.media:description: China is the world's top consumer of coal and the largest greenhouse gas emitter

item.description: 82 Killed, 9 Still Missing After Explosion At Coal Mine In China
item.content:encoded: 82 Killed, 9 Still Missing After Explosion At Coal Mine In China

item.title: US-Iran War Live Updates: Iran Blames US 'Excessive Demands' As Fresh Strike Fears Loom

media:content.media:description: Trump said it would save "a lot of time, energy and lives" if Iran made a deal.

item.description: US President Donald Trump said a deal with Iran could happen "very quickly, or (in) a few days."
item.content:encoded: US President Donald Trump said a deal with Iran could happen "very quickly, or (in) a few days."

item.title: US Death Inmate's Execution Postponed After Staff Fails To Find Vein

media:content.media:description: Medical issues with IV line cause Tennessee to postpone Tony Carruthers' execution.

item.description: Tennessee delays Tony Carruthers execution after staff members fail to establish a backup IV line for lethal injection.
item.content:encoded: Tennessee delays Tony Carruthers execution after staff members fail to establish a backup IV line for lethal injection.

item.title: Ex-CIA Officer Aaron Lukas To Replace Tulsi Gabbard As Acting US Intelligence Chief

media:content.media:description: Lukas was nominated last year to serve as Gabbard's deputy.

item.description: Announcing the decision in a social media post on Friday, US President Trump described Aaron Lukas as “highly respected.”
item.content:encoded: Announcing the decision in a social media post on Friday, US President Trump described Aaron Lukas as “highly respected.”

item.title: Immigration Arrests Up By 71% In New York After Trump's Takeover: Report

media:content.media:description: Zohran Mamdani ordered the audit as part of efforts to protect immigrant communities

item.description: The audit found that US Immigration and Customs Enforcement arrested 5,567 people in the New York City area between January 20, 2025 and March 10, 2026
item.content:encoded: The audit found that US Immigration and Customs Enforcement arrested 5,567 people in the New York City area between January 20, 2025 and March 10, 2026

item.title: 'Beaten, Tased': Gaza Flotilla Activists Allege Abuse By Israeli Forces In Detention

media:content.media:description: Some 420 activists departed for Turkey on Thursday after they were deported from Israel

item.description: Israel denies mistreatment. The allegations were "false and entirely without factual basis," said Zivan Freidin, a spokesperson for the Israeli Prison Service.
item.content:encoded: Israel denies mistreatment. The allegations were "false and entirely without factual basis," said Zivan Freidin, a spokesperson for the Israeli Prison Service.

item.title: Marco Rubio India Visit Live Updates: Top Trump Aide Concludes Kolkata Visit, Next Stop Is Delhi

media:content.media:description: Marco Rubio India visit: This is Marco Rubio's first trip to India since taking office

item.description: Marco Rubio India Visit Live Updates: The top US diplomat is scheduled to hold talks with External Affairs Minister S Jaishankar and attend a meeting of the Quad foreign ministers.
item.content:encoded: Marco Rubio India Visit Live Updates: The top US diplomat is scheduled to hold talks with External Affairs Minister S Jaishankar and attend a meeting of the Quad foreign ministers.

item.title: 27 Nations Seek World Bank Funding Amid Iran War Impacting Global Energy

media:content.media:description: The war and resulting disruption of global energy markets have hit global supply chains

item.description: The World Bank document did not name the countries or the total amount of funds potentially being sought. The World Bank declined to comment.
item.content:encoded: The World Bank document did not name the countries or the total amount of funds potentially being sought. The World Bank declined to comment.

item.title: UN Nuclear Treaty Talks End Without Deal Amid US-Iran Dispute

media:content.media:description: It was the third failure in a row at a conference reviewing the Nuclear Non-Proliferation Treaty

item.description: Vietnam's UN Ambassador Do Hung Viet, who chaired the conference, announced that there was no consensus among the 191 parties to the Nuclear Nonproliferation Treaty on even a watered-down final document.
item.content:encoded: Vietnam's UN Ambassador Do Hung Viet, who chaired the conference, announced that there was no consensus among the 191 parties to the Nuclear Nonproliferation Treaty on even a watered-down final document.

item.title: 40,000 Evacuated As Chemical Tank Leak Threatens Explosion In California

media:content.media:description: A drone picture shows water being sprayed on a tank in California

item.description: A storage tank holding between 6,000 and 7,000 gallons (22,700 and 26,500 liters) of methyl methacrylate overheated Thursday and began venting vapors into the air at an aerospace plastics facility in Garden Grove
item.content:encoded: A storage tank holding between 6,000 and 7,000 gallons (22,700 and 26,500 liters) of methyl methacrylate overheated Thursday and began venting vapors into the air at an aerospace plastics facility in Garden Grove

item.title: Watch: Elon Musk's SpaceX Starship Explodes During Splashdown In Indian Ocean

media:content.media:description: Elon Musk's SpaceX on May 22 launched its latest Starship, sending rocket soaring into Texas skies

item.description: The third-generation Starship spacecraft carried out a maneuver that saw it flip upright and reignite its engines for control, despite one being out of commission.
item.content:encoded: The third-generation Starship spacecraft carried out a maneuver that saw it flip upright and reignite its engines for control, despite one being out of commission.

item.title: 'Spoke Truths That Trump Hated': Iran Praises Tulsi Gabbard After Resignation

media:content.media:description: Tulsi Gabbard has resigned following her husband's diagnosis with a rare form of cancer.

item.description: Tulsi Gabbard shared her resignation letter and said she feels it's imperative she stays by her husband's side.
item.content:encoded: Tulsi Gabbard shared her resignation letter and said she feels it's imperative she stays by her husband's side.

item.title: Opinion: Opinion | US-India Relations: Can Marco Rubio Fix It?
item.description: Marco Rubio, the secretary of state and national security advisor, has arrived in India on his first visit as "Mr Fix It".
item.content:encoded: Marco Rubio, the secretary of state and national security advisor, has arrived in India on his first visit as "Mr Fix It".

item.title: Video: Donald Trump Tosses Stephen Colbert In Dumpster Before YMCA Dance In AI-Generated Clip

media:content.media:description: Trump posted a video showing him tossing Colbert in a dumpster following "The Late Show" finale.

item.description: US President Donald Trump shared an AI-generated video mocking Stephen Colbert after "The Late Show" ended.
item.content:encoded: US President Donald Trump shared an AI-generated video mocking Stephen Colbert after "The Late Show" ended.

item.title: Quad, Oil, Defence: Why Marco Rubio's India Visit Carries High Stakes

media:content.media:description: Rubio's four-day visit is expected to cover nearly every major pillar of the India-US relationship

item.description: India continues to purchase large volumes of discounted Russian oil, but the US is looking to expand its footprint in India's energy market through LNG and crude exports.
item.content:encoded: India continues to purchase large volumes of discounted Russian oil, but the US is looking to expand its footprint in India's energy market through LNG and crude exports.

item.title: Inside Maldives "Death Cave": Chilling New Photos From Site Of Six-Diver Tragedy

media:content.media:description: Five Italian divers disappeared while exploring a complex cave system near Vaavu Atoll.

item.description: Investigators believe the group became trapped after venturing too deep into the unmapped cave network, where poor visibility and narrow passages complicated rescue operations.
item.content:encoded: Investigators believe the group became trapped after venturing too deep into the unmapped cave network, where poor visibility and narrow passages complicated rescue operations.

item.title: US Considering New Strikes On Iran Amid Ongoing Negotiations: Report

media:content.media:description: The White House did not comment on the reports

item.description: Negotiations are said to be ongoing, with Pakistan -- which is mediating between the US and Iran -- sending its military chief to Tehran in an attempt to seal a deal.
item.content:encoded: Negotiations are said to be ongoing, with Pakistan -- which is mediating between the US and Iran -- sending its military chief to Tehran in an attempt to seal a deal.

item.title: Trump To Miss Son's Wedding Due To Iran War, Says "Love For US Doesn't Allow Me"

media:content.media:description: US President Donald Trump and Donald Trump Jr. in Washington DC (File)

item.description: Trump had said a day earlier that the Iran war made it "bad timing" for him to attend Donald Trump Jr's wedding to Bettina Anderson in the Bahamas this weekend.
item.content:encoded: Trump had said a day earlier that the Iran war made it "bad timing" for him to attend Donald Trump Jr's wedding to Bettina Anderson in the Bahamas this weekend.

item.title: Work-From-Home Refusal Can Trigger Lawsuits, Rules UK Tribunal In Anxiety Case

media:content.media:description: Legal experts say this decision sends a clear message to UK employers.

item.description: The tribunal found the council failed to make reasonable adjustments for her mental health condition, setting a significant legal precedent for remote-working rights.
item.content:encoded: The tribunal found the council failed to make reasonable adjustments for her mental health condition, setting a significant legal precedent for remote-working rights.

item.title: H-1B Visa Applications Drop 38%. Trump Administration Says Days Of Abuse Over

media:content.media:description: The immigration agency also said the profile of selected applicants appeared to be changing

item.description: Data released by the US Citizenship and Immigration Services (USCIS) showed that properly submitted H-1B registrations fell by 38.5 per cent compared to last year, from 343,981 in fiscal year 2026 to 211,600 for fiscal year 2027.
item.content:encoded: Data released by the US Citizenship and Immigration Services (USCIS) showed that properly submitted H-1B registrations fell by 38.5 per cent compared to last year, from 343,981 in fiscal year 2026 to 211,600 for fiscal year 2027.
